generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.com/DTDFVocab"
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for ego vehicle speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera visual data transmitted from physical twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data transmitted from physical twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted from physical twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control algorithm for lead vehicle detection",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing, saving, and reporting vehicle state",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeViewingInsight, ReportingInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC control algorithm",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management via UI for setting desired speed and emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides SettingDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeViewingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing of vehicle state for driver trust"
]

instance ReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC control algorithm for lead vehicle detection",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SettingDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed via remote UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via remote UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTime3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for controlling steering angle"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Frontend controlling motor and steering servo"
]

instance LowerChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis layer for autonomy components"
]

instance UpperChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer for autonomy components"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Translation Frontend for serializing and translating data between physical and virtual twins"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle",
    base:contains LowerChassisLayer, UpperChassisLayer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, JetsonNXAntenna, JetsonOrinNano, VedderESC, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, ActuationFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built by retrofitting a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands such as desired speed adjustments, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable signals sent from the DT's Actuation FE to the motor and steering servo actuators on the physical twin."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy as per 3GPP V2V specifications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross-System) communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity, with Data Translation FE handling data serialization and protocol alignment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and validation, and operational phase for monitoring and optimization, covering both 'as designed' and 'as operated' representation phases."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency, ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Data Translation FE for serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity components offloaded to cloud for computation; User Entity on remote client machines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy, 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication latency."
]
